style_effects: Gentle, iridescent fairy dust particles drift upward in slow, swirling patterns around Scyther, catching the soft light like tiny prismatic shards. A delicate, pearlescent aura pulses gently from its body in the shape of overlapping petal silhouettes, refracting light into a spectrum of pastel hues. The atmosphere glows with a warm, honeyed amber radiance that casts subtle, shimmering ripples across the scene, evoking a serene, dreamlike ambiance. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
